TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == miadupay tu asu'ay a kakaenen Áĺéť£üÁćĶšļļ miadupay tu asu'ay a kakanen "kamu nu Zipun, „Éą„É™„ā≥" nu Zipun mingikiway tu mangga ci Taw-tay-kwang-nyen a nisulitan a mangga. i 2008 a mihca 6 a bulad katukuh 2016 a mihca 11 a bulad i "sinbun nu masakapahay Jump" tahkal, nu Taywan I "paw-taw masakapahay tahkal, hamin nu mangga 43 lulud mapahezek tu. I 2011 a mihcaan patahkal tu musaungayay a mangga, sangale macunus ku tademaw. uyni nisulitan i ci-hwan mitahaway anisulitan a mangga, nisulitanay a kitakit u kitakit matumes ku nizatengan tu micidekay tu kasatiman a kakaenen tu asu'ay a kaken nu kitakit. tinaku kuyni nizatengan a kakaenen, hamin titi nu uzip malanamu i sema satu mapawpaw tahkal ku simal nu aadipen, paymihcaan izaw tu ku asu'ay a heci nu kalang, tahkal ku bangsis nu pay-lan-ti tu makay nemnemay a nanum. nika kuyni asu'ay a kakaenen cayay ku makatalay a micidekay aadepen, uyza mulangaway i la'cusay a hekal katalawan aca a kitizaan. namahiza uyni caay kaazihay tu cayay katinengan ku asu'ay a asu'ay a kakanen a zidayan, izaw katuud ku sinmungay mitesek tu lacusay a kitizaan, kinapatay sa miala tu micidekay asu'ay a miadupay tu asu'ay a kakanen. paymiadupay tu asu'ay a kakaenen nikauzip tu patucekan uyza u uzip ku mialaay tu kakaenen amalepun pasu lami', kabi, buting, titi, tadalami', sala,sicedamay, asu'ay a nanjum pulung 8 lamangan ku nisalami'an nikauzip a lami'. Angangan a kungku, anganngan u miadupay tu asu'ay a kakanen sepat a tademaw ku cacay ci Te-luy-ke sakay amalepun, ku nu uzipay hamin a kanen a lami', atu misalami'ay asayhu ci Syaw-sung mapulung i kitakit tu asu'ay a kakaenen mikilim tu micidekay asu'ay a kakaenen a miliwku. u mikilimay tu kaliyuhan tu asu'ay a kakaenen i hamin a kitakit tacuwacuwa a miculil, miala, miala tu canacanan a kakenen mitahaw miadupay a kawaw, zuma kapahay a pikanan matatelak tu miadupay tu asu'ay a kakanen, pakayni midiput pawapen tu kapahay a kakaenen. . i hamin asu'ay kakaenen a zizayan atu miadupay tu asu'ay a kakanen malecay u kasatiman, miadupah situngus miala tu sasalami'a a kekaenen situngus sangaleb asu' ku kakaenen, sakay miadupay tu asu'ay a kakanen u kahenulan ku misalami'ay, malecad tu IGO hut-cang ni I-lung a kamu "sakay pawaapen tu kakaenen a miadupay tu asu'ay a kakanen" misalami' tu kakaenen u kahenilan ku misalami'ay a atademaw", payawan anu pina ku nipawapen tu kapaha a kakaenen miadupay tu asu'ay a kakanen anu nayi' ku matinengay misalami' hawsa, anai' ku canacanan a acaan, uyni a kamu maazih ku misalami'ay tatenga' madikec tu ku hamin nu kakaenen a ziday u kahenulan ku mahiniay. ,Ś¶āŚźĆIGO . muliya mauzip ku miadupay ŚÜćÁĒüÁćĶšļļ muliya ku miadupay i asu'ay a kakaenen a ziday izaw ku tanektek ahemaw ku aenengan, I hamin asu'ay kakaeanen a zidayan tahakay a kakaenen caay kahamin maala, muliya ku miadupay itini amisabaluc u', situngus kuheni acaay kahamin ku asu'ay a kakaenen aziday atu tahakay amalecad malawpes, u kalihanawan a malawpes amauzip ku ku nipalumaan aaduen, u micidek a nalimaan nuheni muliyaw i tahakan a mabuwah ku nipalumaan aadupen, situngus aca kuheni mingaay tu adada atu mamalawpesay a mauzipay a pauzip a akawaw, nayi' ku sasakamuen aca kuheni hamin nu asu'ay a kakaenen a ziday taneng malahad katukuh ayza u naicelangan. sakay misalami'ay mimelmelay a sayhu atu miadupay tu asu'ay a kakaenen mualecad ku kahenulan, anu kamu tu kuwang sa nu hitay atu taylin a saluabang kuyza, tatenga'aytu uyza saytu u misalami'ay a saliabang, misalami'ay misan ga' tu saliaban g u tatenga'an a mimelmelay a sayhu, , kamu tu sakay lalid sayay misahemayay misalami'ay, pawapen tu sasalami'an atu sapimelmelan mimelmelay a sayhu u mikisalami'ay a tademaw tu zuma a cabay, kapah ku nisanga' nuheni tu saytu pacabay tu pinaay nu misalami'ay mauzip tu paydemiad, mapulung kuheni misaicela ng i kalepacawan, pacumud tu saliabang nu uzipay a satu pacabay tu misalami'ay mipecih tu pinaay a kakaenen, misanga' tu pinaay asu'ay a lami'. "kanatal asu'ay kakaenen s sakaput", paketu buyu'ay a aadupen puazih tu aalaen, au talakawen ku aca amicakay, nauyza Lyen-hekow a adidi'ay a sakapu, kilul mitesekaya tu asu'ay a kakaenen macunus tu ku kakaydihan tu makay teked nu Lyen-hekow a sateked, ayza mikanumay a kanatal malakui' tu hamin nu Lyen-hekow atu 360 ku kanatal, hina i IGO tungusa a pakanan mikawaw tu tesekay a asu'ay a kakaenen kasa sakakaay nu kanatal malecapu, masasu acima ku sikalisiway atu icelangay a cen-ce. putah, nu tademaw a nisanga'an aadupe mulangaway atu mauzipay, i tahak yadah ku xnipahabay tu umahay a aadupen mulangaway, IGO itini aminmikinsa tu mauzipay. pa-wang pa-wang ŚÖęÁéč pasasizuma mikuwan tu "asu'ay kakaenen a kitakit" pasetil talu, mikuwan tu paysetil titi tu saicelangay lamangan a waluay "hungti aadupan" uyza izaw ku "icelang" a pangil ku mauzipay. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a nilaculan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == miadupaj tu asu Ē~ °aj a kaka…ôn…ôn **** miadupaj tu asu Ē~ °aj a kakan…ôn "kamu nu zipun, ***" nu zipun miŇčikiwaj tu maŇčga ¶i taw-taj-kwaŇč-nj…ôn a nisur~…ĺitan a maŇčga. i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad i "sinbun nu masakapańßaj *ump" tańßkar~…ĺ, nu tajwan i "paw-taw masakapańßaj tańßkar~…ĺ, ńßamin nu maŇčga ** r~…ĺur~…ĺud mapańß…ôz…ôk tu. i **** a mińß ¶aan patańßkar~…ĺ tu musauŇčajaj a maŇčga, saŇčar~…ĺ…ô ma ¶unus ku tad…ômaw. ujni nisur~…ĺitan i ¶i-ńßwan mitańßawaj anisur~…ĺitan a maŇčga, nisur~…ĺitanaj a kitakit u kitakit matum…ôs ku nizat…ôŇčan tu mi ¶id…ôkaj tu kasatiman a kaka…ôn…ôn tu asu Ē~ °aj a kak…ôn nu kitakit. tinaku kujni nizat…ôŇčan a kaka…ôn…ôn, ńßamin titi nu uzip mar~…ĺanamu i s…ôma satu mapawpaw tańßkar~…ĺ ku simar~…ĺ nu aadip…ôn, pajmińß ¶aan izaw tu ku asu Ē~ °aj a ńß…ô ¶i nu kar~…ĺaŇč, tańßkar~…ĺ ku baŇčsis nu paj-r~…ĺan-ti tu makaj n…ômn…ômaj a nanum. nika kujni asu Ē~ °aj a kaka…ôn…ôn ¶ajaj ku makatar~…ĺaj a mi ¶id…ôkaj aad…ôp…ôn, ujza mur~…ĺaŇčawaj i r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ katar~…ĺawan a ¶a a kitizaan. namańßiza ujni ¶aaj kaazińßaj tu ¶ajaj katin…ôŇčan ku asu Ē~ °aj a asu Ē~ °aj a kakan…ôn a zidajan, izaw katuud ku sinmuŇčaj mit…ôs…ôk tu r~…ĺa ¶usaj a kitizaan, kinapataj sa miar~…ĺa tu mi ¶id…ôkaj asu Ē~ °aj a miadupaj tu asu Ē~ °aj a kakan…ôn. pajmiadupaj tu asu Ē~ °aj a kaka…ôn…ôn nikauzip tu patu ¶…ôkan ujza u uzip ku miar~…ĺaaj tu kaka…ôn…ôn amar~…ĺ…ôpun pasu r~…ĺami Ē~ °, kabi, butiŇč, titi, tadar~…ĺami Ē~ °, sar~…ĺa,si ¶…ôdamaj, asu Ē~ °aj a nanjum pur~…ĺuŇč * r~…ĺamaŇčan ku nisar~…ĺami Ē~ °an nikauzip a r~…ĺami Ē~ °. aŇčaŇčan a kuŇčku, aŇčanŇčan u miadupaj tu asu Ē~ °aj a kakan…ôn s…ôpat a tad…ômaw ku ¶a ¶aj ¶i t…ô-r~…ĺuj-k…ô sakaj amar~…ĺ…ôpun, ku nu uzipaj ńßamin a kan…ôn a r~…ĺami Ē~ °, atu misar~…ĺami Ē~ °aj asajńßu ¶i sjaw-suŇč mapur~…ĺuŇč i kitakit tu asu Ē~ °aj a kaka…ôn…ôn mikir~…ĺim tu mi ¶id…ôkaj asu Ē~ °aj a kaka…ôn…ôn a mir~…ĺiwku. u mikir~…ĺimaj tu kar~…ĺijuńßan tu asu Ē~ °aj a kaka…ôn…ôn i ńßamin a kitakit ta ¶uwa ¶uwa a mi ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, miar~…ĺa, miar~…ĺa tu ¶ana ¶anan a kak…ôn…ôn mitańßaw miadupaj a kawaw, zuma kapańßaj a pikanan matat…ôr~…ĺak tu miadupaj tu asu Ē~ °aj a kakan…ôn, pakajni midiput pawap…ôn tu kapańßaj a kaka…ôn…ôn. . i ńßamin asu Ē~ °aj kaka…ôn…ôn a zizajan atu miadupaj tu asu Ē~ °aj a kakan…ôn mar~…ĺ…ô ¶aj u kasatiman, miadupańß situŇčus miar~…ĺa tu sasar~…ĺami Ē~ °a a k…ôka…ôn…ôn situŇčus saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb asu Ē~ ° ku kaka…ôn…ôn, sakaj miadupaj tu asu Ē~ °aj a kakan…ôn u kańß…ônur~…ĺan ku misar~…ĺami Ē~ °aj, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu igo ńßut- ¶aŇč ni i-r~…ĺuŇč a kamu "sakaj pawaap…ôn tu kaka…ôn…ôn a miadupaj tu asu Ē~ °aj a kakan…ôn" misar~…ĺami Ē~ ° tu kaka…ôn…ôn u kańß…ônir~…ĺan ku misar~…ĺami Ē~ °aj a atad…ômaw", pajawan anu pina ku nipawap…ôn tu kapańßa a kaka…ôn…ôn miadupaj tu asu Ē~ °aj a kakan…ôn anu naji Ē~ ° ku matin…ôŇčaj misar~…ĺami Ē~ ° ńßawsa, anai Ē~ ° ku ¶ana ¶anan a a ¶aan, ujni a kamu maazińß ku misar~…ĺami Ē~ °aj tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° madik…ô ¶ tu ku ńßamin nu kaka…ôn…ôn a zidaj u kańß…ônur~…ĺan ku mańßiniaj. ,**igo . mur~…ĺija mauzip ku miadupaj **** mur~…ĺija ku miadupaj i asu Ē~ °aj a kaka…ôn…ôn a zidaj izaw ku tan…ôkt…ôk ańß…ômaw ku a…ôn…ôŇčan, i ńßamin asu Ē~ °aj kaka…ôan…ôn a zidajan tańßakaj a kaka…ôn…ôn ¶aaj kańßamin maar~…ĺa, mur~…ĺija ku miadupaj itini amisabar~…ĺu ¶ u Ē~ °, situŇčus kuńß…ôni a ¶aaj kańßamin ku asu Ē~ °aj a kaka…ôn…ôn azidaj atu tańßakaj amar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad mar~…ĺawp…ôs, u kar~…ĺińßanawan a mar~…ĺawp…ôs amauzip ku ku nipar~…ĺumaan aadu…ôn, u mi ¶id…ôk a nar~…ĺimaan nuńß…ôni mur~…ĺijaw i tańßakan a mabuwańß ku nipar~…ĺumaan aadup…ôn, situŇčus a ¶a kuńß…ôni miŇčaaj tu adada atu mamar~…ĺawp…ôsaj a mauzipaj a pauzip a akawaw, naji Ē~ ° ku sasakamu…ôn a ¶a kuńß…ôni ńßamin nu asu Ē~ °aj a kaka…ôn…ôn a zidaj tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺańßad katukuńß ajza u nai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčan. sakaj misar~…ĺami Ē~ °aj mim…ôr~…ĺm…ôr~…ĺaj a sajńßu atu miadupaj tu asu Ē~ °aj a kaka…ôn…ôn muar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku kańß…ônur~…ĺan, anu kamu tu kuwaŇč sa nu ńßitaj atu tajr~…ĺin a sar~…ĺuabaŇč kujza, tat…ôŇča Ē~ °ajtu ujza sajtu u misar~…ĺami Ē~ °aj a sar~…ĺiabaŇč, misar~…ĺami Ē~ °aj misan ga Ē~ ° tu sar~…ĺiaban g u tat…ôŇča Ē~ °an a mim…ôr~…ĺm…ôr~…ĺaj a sajńßu, , kamu tu sakaj r~…ĺar~…ĺid sajaj misańß…ômajaj misar~…ĺami Ē~ °aj, pawap…ôn tu sasar~…ĺami Ē~ °an atu sapim…ôr~…ĺm…ôr~…ĺan mim…ôr~…ĺm…ôr~…ĺaj a sajńßu u mikisar~…ĺami Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw tu zuma a ¶abaj, kapańß ku nisaŇča Ē~ ° nuńß…ôni tu sajtu pa ¶abaj tu pinaaj nu misar~…ĺami Ē~ °aj mauzip tu pajd…ômiad, mapur~…ĺuŇč kuńß…ôni misai ¶…ôr~…ĺa Ňč i kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan, pa ¶umud tu sar~…ĺiabaŇč nu uzipaj a satu pa ¶abaj tu misar~…ĺami Ē~ °aj mip…ô ¶ińß tu pinaaj a kaka…ôn…ôn, misaŇča Ē~ ° tu pinaaj asu Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺami Ē~ °. "kanatar~…ĺ asu Ē~ °aj kaka…ôn…ôn s sakaput", pak…ôtu buju Ē~ °aj a aadup…ôn puazińß tu aar~…ĺa…ôn, au tar~…ĺakaw…ôn ku a ¶a ami ¶akaj, naujza r~…ĺj…ôn-ńß…ôkow a adidi Ē~ °aj a sakapu, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ mit…ôs…ôkaja tu asu Ē~ °aj a kaka…ôn…ôn ma ¶unus tu ku kakajdińßan tu makaj t…ôk…ôd nu r~…ĺj…ôn-ńß…ôkow a sat…ôk…ôd, ajza mikanumaj a kanatar~…ĺ mar~…ĺakui Ē~ ° tu ńßamin nu r~…ĺj…ôn-ńß…ôkow atu *** ku kanatar~…ĺ, ńßina i igo tuŇčusa a pakanan mikawaw tu t…ôs…ôkaj a asu Ē~ °aj a kaka…ôn…ôn kasa sakakaaj nu kanatar~…ĺ mar~…ĺ…ô ¶apu, masasu a ¶ima ku sikar~…ĺisiwaj atu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô. putańß, nu tad…ômaw a nisaŇča Ē~ °an aadup…ô mur~…ĺaŇčawaj atu mauzipaj, i tańßak jadańß ku *nipańßabaj tu umańßaj a aadup…ôn mur~…ĺaŇčawaj, igo itini aminmikinsa tu mauzipaj. pa-waŇč pa-waŇč ** pasasizuma mikuwan tu "asu Ē~ °aj kaka…ôn…ôn a kitakit" pas…ôtir~…ĺ tar~…ĺu, mikuwan tu pajs…ôtir~…ĺ titi tu sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj r~…ĺamaŇčan a war~…ĺuaj "ńßuŇčti aadupan" ujza izaw ku "i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč" a paŇčir~…ĺ ku mauzipaj. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == miadupay tu asu'ay a kakaenen Áĺéť£üÁćĶšļļ miadupay tu asu'ay a kakanen "kamu nu Zipun, „Éą„É™„ā≥" nu Zipun mingikiway tu mangga ci Taw-tay-kwang-nyen a nisulitan a mangga. i 2008 a mihca 6 a bulad katukuh 2016 a mihca 11 a bulad i "sinbun nu masakapahay Jump" tahkal, nu Taywan I "paw-taw masakapahay tahkal, hamin nu mangga 43 lulud mapahezek tu. I 2011 a mihcaan patahkal tu musaungayay a mangga, sangale macunus ku tademaw. uyni nisulitan i ci-hwan mitahaway anisulitan a mangga, nisulitanay a kitakit u kitakit matumes ku nizatengan tu micidekay tu kasatiman a kakaenen tu asu'ay a kaken nu kitakit. tinaku kuyni nizatengan a kakaenen, hamin titi nu uzip malanamu i sema satu mapawpaw tahkal ku simal nu aadipen, paymihcaan izaw tu ku asu'ay a heci nu kalang, tahkal ku bangsis nu pay-lan-ti tu makay nemnemay a nanum. nika kuyni asu'ay a kakaenen cayay ku makatalay a micidekay aadepen, uyza mulangaway i la'cusay a hekal katalawan aca a kitizaan. namahiza uyni caay kaazihay tu cayay katinengan ku asu'ay a asu'ay a kakanen a zidayan, izaw katuud ku sinmungay mitesek tu lacusay a kitizaan, kinapatay sa miala tu micidekay asu'ay a miadupay tu asu'ay a kakanen. paymiadupay tu asu'ay a kakaenen nikauzip tu patucekan uyza u uzip ku mialaay tu kakaenen amalepun pasu lami', kabi, buting, titi, tadalami', sala,sicedamay, asu'ay a nanjum pulung 8 lamangan ku nisalami'an nikauzip a lami'. Angangan a kungku, anganngan u miadupay tu asu'ay a kakanen sepat a tademaw ku cacay ci Te-luy-ke sakay amalepun, ku nu uzipay hamin a kanen a lami', atu misalami'ay asayhu ci Syaw-sung mapulung i kitakit tu asu'ay a kakaenen mikilim tu micidekay asu'ay a kakaenen a miliwku. u mikilimay tu kaliyuhan tu asu'ay a kakaenen i hamin a kitakit tacuwacuwa a miculil, miala, miala tu canacanan a kakenen mitahaw miadupay a kawaw, zuma kapahay a pikanan matatelak tu miadupay tu asu'ay a kakanen, pakayni midiput pawapen tu kapahay a kakaenen. . i hamin asu'ay kakaenen a zizayan atu miadupay tu asu'ay a kakanen malecay u kasatiman, miadupah situngus miala tu sasalami'a a kekaenen situngus sangaleb asu' ku kakaenen, sakay miadupay tu asu'ay a kakanen u kahenulan ku misalami'ay, malecad tu IGO hut-cang ni I-lung a kamu "sakay pawaapen tu kakaenen a miadupay tu asu'ay a kakanen" misalami' tu kakaenen u kahenilan ku misalami'ay a atademaw", payawan anu pina ku nipawapen tu kapaha a kakaenen miadupay tu asu'ay a kakanen anu nayi' ku matinengay misalami' hawsa, anai' ku canacanan a acaan, uyni a kamu maazih ku misalami'ay tatenga' madikec tu ku hamin nu kakaenen a ziday u kahenulan ku mahiniay. ,Ś¶āŚźĆIGO . muliya mauzip ku miadupay ŚÜćÁĒüÁćĶšļļ muliya ku miadupay i asu'ay a kakaenen a ziday izaw ku tanektek ahemaw ku aenengan, I hamin asu'ay kakaeanen a zidayan tahakay a kakaenen caay kahamin maala, muliya ku miadupay itini amisabaluc u', situngus kuheni acaay kahamin ku asu'ay a kakaenen aziday atu tahakay amalecad malawpes, u kalihanawan a malawpes amauzip ku ku nipalumaan aaduen, u micidek a nalimaan nuheni muliyaw i tahakan a mabuwah ku nipalumaan aadupen, situngus aca kuheni mingaay tu adada atu mamalawpesay a mauzipay a pauzip a akawaw, nayi' ku sasakamuen aca kuheni hamin nu asu'ay a kakaenen a ziday taneng malahad katukuh ayza u naicelangan. sakay misalami'ay mimelmelay a sayhu atu miadupay tu asu'ay a kakaenen mualecad ku kahenulan, anu kamu tu kuwang sa nu hitay atu taylin a saluabang kuyza, tatenga'aytu uyza saytu u misalami'ay a saliabang, misalami'ay misan ga' tu saliaban g u tatenga'an a mimelmelay a sayhu, , kamu tu sakay lalid sayay misahemayay misalami'ay, pawapen tu sasalami'an atu sapimelmelan mimelmelay a sayhu u mikisalami'ay a tademaw tu zuma a cabay, kapah ku nisanga' nuheni tu saytu pacabay tu pinaay nu misalami'ay mauzip tu paydemiad, mapulung kuheni misaicela ng i kalepacawan, pacumud tu saliabang nu uzipay a satu pacabay tu misalami'ay mipecih tu pinaay a kakaenen, misanga' tu pinaay asu'ay a lami'. "kanatal asu'ay kakaenen s sakaput", paketu buyu'ay a aadupen puazih tu aalaen, au talakawen ku aca amicakay, nauyza Lyen-hekow a adidi'ay a sakapu, kilul mitesekaya tu asu'ay a kakaenen macunus tu ku kakaydihan tu makay teked nu Lyen-hekow a sateked, ayza mikanumay a kanatal malakui' tu hamin nu Lyen-hekow atu 360 ku kanatal, hina i IGO tungusa a pakanan mikawaw tu tesekay a asu'ay a kakaenen kasa sakakaay nu kanatal malecapu, masasu acima ku sikalisiway atu icelangay a cen-ce. putah, nu tademaw a nisanga'an aadupe mulangaway atu mauzipay, i tahak yadah ku xnipahabay tu umahay a aadupen mulangaway, IGO itini aminmikinsa tu mauzipay. pa-wang pa-wang ŚÖęÁéč pasasizuma mikuwan tu "asu'ay kakaenen a kitakit" pasetil talu, mikuwan tu paysetil titi tu saicelangay lamangan a waluay "hungti aadupan" uyza izaw ku "icelang" a pangil ku mauzipay. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a nilaculan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == miadupaj tu asu Ē~ °aj a kaka…ôn…ôn **** miadupaj tu asu Ē~ °aj a kakan…ôn "kamu nu zipun, ***" nu zipun miŇčikiwaj tu maŇčga ¶i taw-taj-kwaŇč-nj…ôn a nisur~…ĺitan a maŇčga. i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad i "sinbun nu masakapańßaj *ump" tańßkar~…ĺ, nu tajwan i "paw-taw masakapańßaj tańßkar~…ĺ, ńßamin nu maŇčga ** r~…ĺur~…ĺud mapańß…ôz…ôk tu. i **** a mińß ¶aan patańßkar~…ĺ tu musauŇčajaj a maŇčga, saŇčar~…ĺ…ô ma ¶unus ku tad…ômaw. ujni nisur~…ĺitan i ¶i-ńßwan mitańßawaj anisur~…ĺitan a maŇčga, nisur~…ĺitanaj a kitakit u kitakit matum…ôs ku nizat…ôŇčan tu mi ¶id…ôkaj tu kasatiman a kaka…ôn…ôn tu asu Ē~ °aj a kak…ôn nu kitakit. tinaku kujni nizat…ôŇčan a kaka…ôn…ôn, ńßamin titi nu uzip mar~…ĺanamu i s…ôma satu mapawpaw tańßkar~…ĺ ku simar~…ĺ nu aadip…ôn, pajmińß ¶aan izaw tu ku asu Ē~ °aj a ńß…ô ¶i nu kar~…ĺaŇč, tańßkar~…ĺ ku baŇčsis nu paj-r~…ĺan-ti tu makaj n…ômn…ômaj a nanum. nika kujni asu Ē~ °aj a kaka…ôn…ôn ¶ajaj ku makatar~…ĺaj a mi ¶id…ôkaj aad…ôp…ôn, ujza mur~…ĺaŇčawaj i r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ katar~…ĺawan a ¶a a kitizaan. namańßiza ujni ¶aaj kaazińßaj tu ¶ajaj katin…ôŇčan ku asu Ē~ °aj a asu Ē~ °aj a kakan…ôn a zidajan, izaw katuud ku sinmuŇčaj mit…ôs…ôk tu r~…ĺa ¶usaj a kitizaan, kinapataj sa miar~…ĺa tu mi ¶id…ôkaj asu Ē~ °aj a miadupaj tu asu Ē~ °aj a kakan…ôn. pajmiadupaj tu asu Ē~ °aj a kaka…ôn…ôn nikauzip tu patu ¶…ôkan ujza u uzip ku miar~…ĺaaj tu kaka…ôn…ôn amar~…ĺ…ôpun pasu r~…ĺami Ē~ °, kabi, butiŇč, titi, tadar~…ĺami Ē~ °, sar~…ĺa,si ¶…ôdamaj, asu Ē~ °aj a nanjum pur~…ĺuŇč * r~…ĺamaŇčan ku nisar~…ĺami Ē~ °an nikauzip a r~…ĺami Ē~ °. aŇčaŇčan a kuŇčku, aŇčanŇčan u miadupaj tu asu Ē~ °aj a kakan…ôn s…ôpat a tad…ômaw ku ¶a ¶aj ¶i t…ô-r~…ĺuj-k…ô sakaj amar~…ĺ…ôpun, ku nu uzipaj ńßamin a kan…ôn a r~…ĺami Ē~ °, atu misar~…ĺami Ē~ °aj asajńßu ¶i sjaw-suŇč mapur~…ĺuŇč i kitakit tu asu Ē~ °aj a kaka…ôn…ôn mikir~…ĺim tu mi ¶id…ôkaj asu Ē~ °aj a kaka…ôn…ôn a mir~…ĺiwku. u mikir~…ĺimaj tu kar~…ĺijuńßan tu asu Ē~ °aj a kaka…ôn…ôn i ńßamin a kitakit ta ¶uwa ¶uwa a mi ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, miar~…ĺa, miar~…ĺa tu ¶ana ¶anan a kak…ôn…ôn mitańßaw miadupaj a kawaw, zuma kapańßaj a pikanan matat…ôr~…ĺak tu miadupaj tu asu Ē~ °aj a kakan…ôn, pakajni midiput pawap…ôn tu kapańßaj a kaka…ôn…ôn. . i ńßamin asu Ē~ °aj kaka…ôn…ôn a zizajan atu miadupaj tu asu Ē~ °aj a kakan…ôn mar~…ĺ…ô ¶aj u kasatiman, miadupańß situŇčus miar~…ĺa tu sasar~…ĺami Ē~ °a a k…ôka…ôn…ôn situŇčus saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb asu Ē~ ° ku kaka…ôn…ôn, sakaj miadupaj tu asu Ē~ °aj a kakan…ôn u kańß…ônur~…ĺan ku misar~…ĺami Ē~ °aj, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu igo ńßut- ¶aŇč ni i-r~…ĺuŇč a kamu "sakaj pawaap…ôn tu kaka…ôn…ôn a miadupaj tu asu Ē~ °aj a kakan…ôn" misar~…ĺami Ē~ ° tu kaka…ôn…ôn u kańß…ônir~…ĺan ku misar~…ĺami Ē~ °aj a atad…ômaw", pajawan anu pina ku nipawap…ôn tu kapańßa a kaka…ôn…ôn miadupaj tu asu Ē~ °aj a kakan…ôn anu naji Ē~ ° ku matin…ôŇčaj misar~…ĺami Ē~ ° ńßawsa, anai Ē~ ° ku ¶ana ¶anan a a ¶aan, ujni a kamu maazińß ku misar~…ĺami Ē~ °aj tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° madik…ô ¶ tu ku ńßamin nu kaka…ôn…ôn a zidaj u kańß…ônur~…ĺan ku mańßiniaj. ,**igo . mur~…ĺija mauzip ku miadupaj **** mur~…ĺija ku miadupaj i asu Ē~ °aj a kaka…ôn…ôn a zidaj izaw ku tan…ôkt…ôk ańß…ômaw ku a…ôn…ôŇčan, i ńßamin asu Ē~ °aj kaka…ôan…ôn a zidajan tańßakaj a kaka…ôn…ôn ¶aaj kańßamin maar~…ĺa, mur~…ĺija ku miadupaj itini amisabar~…ĺu ¶ u Ē~ °, situŇčus kuńß…ôni a ¶aaj kańßamin ku asu Ē~ °aj a kaka…ôn…ôn azidaj atu tańßakaj amar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad mar~…ĺawp…ôs, u kar~…ĺińßanawan a mar~…ĺawp…ôs amauzip ku ku nipar~…ĺumaan aadu…ôn, u mi ¶id…ôk a nar~…ĺimaan nuńß…ôni mur~…ĺijaw i tańßakan a mabuwańß ku nipar~…ĺumaan aadup…ôn, situŇčus a ¶a kuńß…ôni miŇčaaj tu adada atu mamar~…ĺawp…ôsaj a mauzipaj a pauzip a akawaw, naji Ē~ ° ku sasakamu…ôn a ¶a kuńß…ôni ńßamin nu asu Ē~ °aj a kaka…ôn…ôn a zidaj tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺańßad katukuńß ajza u nai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčan. sakaj misar~…ĺami Ē~ °aj mim…ôr~…ĺm…ôr~…ĺaj a sajńßu atu miadupaj tu asu Ē~ °aj a kaka…ôn…ôn muar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku kańß…ônur~…ĺan, anu kamu tu kuwaŇč sa nu ńßitaj atu tajr~…ĺin a sar~…ĺuabaŇč kujza, tat…ôŇča Ē~ °ajtu ujza sajtu u misar~…ĺami Ē~ °aj a sar~…ĺiabaŇč, misar~…ĺami Ē~ °aj misan ga Ē~ ° tu sar~…ĺiaban g u tat…ôŇča Ē~ °an a mim…ôr~…ĺm…ôr~…ĺaj a sajńßu, , kamu tu sakaj r~…ĺar~…ĺid sajaj misańß…ômajaj misar~…ĺami Ē~ °aj, pawap…ôn tu sasar~…ĺami Ē~ °an atu sapim…ôr~…ĺm…ôr~…ĺan mim…ôr~…ĺm…ôr~…ĺaj a sajńßu u mikisar~…ĺami Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw tu zuma a ¶abaj, kapańß ku nisaŇča Ē~ ° nuńß…ôni tu sajtu pa ¶abaj tu pinaaj nu misar~…ĺami Ē~ °aj mauzip tu pajd…ômiad, mapur~…ĺuŇč kuńß…ôni misai ¶…ôr~…ĺa Ňč i kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan, pa ¶umud tu sar~…ĺiabaŇč nu uzipaj a satu pa ¶abaj tu misar~…ĺami Ē~ °aj mip…ô ¶ińß tu pinaaj a kaka…ôn…ôn, misaŇča Ē~ ° tu pinaaj asu Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺami Ē~ °. "kanatar~…ĺ asu Ē~ °aj kaka…ôn…ôn s sakaput", pak…ôtu buju Ē~ °aj a aadup…ôn puazińß tu aar~…ĺa…ôn, au tar~…ĺakaw…ôn ku a ¶a ami ¶akaj, naujza r~…ĺj…ôn-ńß…ôkow a adidi Ē~ °aj a sakapu, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ mit…ôs…ôkaja tu asu Ē~ °aj a kaka…ôn…ôn ma ¶unus tu ku kakajdińßan tu makaj t…ôk…ôd nu r~…ĺj…ôn-ńß…ôkow a sat…ôk…ôd, ajza mikanumaj a kanatar~…ĺ mar~…ĺakui Ē~ ° tu ńßamin nu r~…ĺj…ôn-ńß…ôkow atu *** ku kanatar~…ĺ, ńßina i igo tuŇčusa a pakanan mikawaw tu t…ôs…ôkaj a asu Ē~ °aj a kaka…ôn…ôn kasa sakakaaj nu kanatar~…ĺ mar~…ĺ…ô ¶apu, masasu a ¶ima ku sikar~…ĺisiwaj atu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô. putańß, nu tad…ômaw a nisaŇča Ē~ °an aadup…ô mur~…ĺaŇčawaj atu mauzipaj, i tańßak jadańß ku *nipańßabaj tu umańßaj a aadup…ôn mur~…ĺaŇčawaj, igo itini aminmikinsa tu mauzipaj. pa-waŇč pa-waŇč ** pasasizuma mikuwan tu "asu Ē~ °aj kaka…ôn…ôn a kitakit" pas…ôtir~…ĺ tar~…ĺu, mikuwan tu pajs…ôtir~…ĺ titi tu sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj r~…ĺamaŇčan a war~…ĺuaj "ńßuŇčti aadupan" ujza izaw ku "i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč" a paŇčir~…ĺ ku mauzipaj. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan
